name: io.github.gener8v/mcp-geographic-data
title: loc8n Geographic Data
description: MCP server for the loc8n Geographic Data API — query demographics, housing, mortgage, migration, and employment data from any MCP-compatible client

environmentVariables.name: LOC8N_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key for the loc8n Geographic Data API

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer token — your loc8n API key
